## 5. 5-Minute Checklist Before Interview

- [ ] Check index boundaries ($0$ and $N-1$).
- [ ] Handle null, empty, or single-element inputs.
- [ ] Check for integer overflow (e.g., use `long` or `a + (b - a) / 2`).
- [ ] Verify space complexity constraints (in-place vs. allocation).
